description: Use this API to return three-winding transformer real values. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr, rval = tr3dat(ibus, jbus, kbus, ickt, string)
python_syntax: ierr, rval = tr3dat(ibus, jbus, kbus, ickt, string)

parameters.name: string
parameters.description: String indicating the three-winding transformer quantity desired. (input).

string.description: Fraction of total ownership assigned to the first owner.
Fraction of total ownership assigned to the second owner.
Fraction of total ownership assigned to the third owner.
Fraction of total ownership assigned to the fourth owner.
Star bus voltage angle in degrees.

error_codes.description: With STRING = FRACTn, n > number of owners; ‘RVAL’ unchanged.
